nasb.text: The sword of the Lord is filled with blood, It is sated with fat, with the blood of lambs and goats, With the fat of the kidneys of rams. For the Lord has a sacrifice in Bozrah And a great slaughter in the land of Edom.

esv.text: The Lord has a sword; it is sated with blood; it is gorged with fat, with the blood of lambs and goats, with the fat of the kidneys of rams. For the Lord has a sacrifice in Bozrah, a great slaughter in the land of Edom.

cnv.text: 耶和華的刀染滿了血， 這刀因脂肪、羊羔和公山羊的血， 以及公綿羊腰子的脂肪而滋潤， 因為耶和華在波斯拉有殺牲獻祭的事， 在以東地有大屠殺。

ccb.text: 祂的刀沾满了血和脂肪， 如同羊羔、公山羊的血和公绵羊肾脏上的脂肪。 因为耶和华要在波斯拉献祭， 在以东大行杀戮。

csbs.text: 耶和华的刀染满了血、沾满了脂肪—— 羊羔和公山羊的血、公绵羊肾脏的脂肪； 因为耶和华要在波斯拉举行祭祀， 在以东地大行杀戮。
